nl_query: Show all leaf questions in the Algorithms paper that have no rubric defined in the approved answer key.
failed_sql:
SELECT q.id, q.code, q.path, q.max_marks, q.display_order
FROM   question q
JOIN   question_paper qp ON qp.id = q.qp_id
WHERE  q.qp_id = :qp_id
  AND  NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1 FROM answer_key ak
         WHERE  ak.qp_id = q.qp_id
           AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
       )
  AND  q.max_marks IS NOT NULL
ORDER  BY q.path;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: there is no parameter $1
LINE 1: ...uestion_paper qp ON qp.id = q.qp_id WHERE qp.id = $1 AND NOT...
                                                             ^
